# catalystcenter_external_authentication (Data Source)

This data source can read the External Authentication.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "catalystcenter_external_authentication" "example" {
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Read-Only

- `enabled` (Boolean) Enable or disable external authentication for Catalyst Center users.
- `id` (String) The id of the object
- `name` (String) Fixed resource identifier.
